glosses.vi: thẻ ghi nợ; thẻ ngân hàng
glosses.ja: デビットカード; 銀行のカード

translations.en: I’m paying with the debit card.
translations.es: Pago con la tarjeta de débito.
translations.fr: Je paie avec ma carte de débit.
translations.it: Pago con la carta di debito.
translations.pt: Vou pagar com o cartão de débito.
translations.vi: Tôi trả bằng thẻ ghi nợ.
translations.hi: मैं डेबिट कार्ड से भुगतान कर रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: デビットカードで支払います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; governs the prepositional phrase indicating means.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces an instrumental phrase.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; agrees with ‘EC-Karte’ after ‘mit’.
Common noun, feminine singular in dative; object of the preposition ‘mit’ (means of payment).

translations.en: You have the debit card with you.
translations.es: Llevas la tarjeta de débito contigo.
translations.fr: Tu as ta carte de débit sur toi.
translations.it: Hai la carta di debito con te.
translations.ru: У тебя с собой дебетовая карта.
translations.pt: Você está com o cartão de débito.
translations.he: יש לך את כרטיס החיוב איתך.
translations.vi: Bạn mang theo thẻ ghi nợ.
translations.nl: Je hebt je pinpas bij je.
translations.uk: У тебе з собою дебетова картка.
translations.el: Έχεις μαζί σου τη χρεωστική κάρτα.
translations.ro: Ai cardul de debit la tine.
translations.ja: 君はデビットカードを持っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present tense, 2nd person singular; expresses possession.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; introduces the direct object.
Common noun, feminine singular in accusative; direct object of ‘hast’.
Adverb; modifies the verb phrase, meaning ‘along/with one, on you’.

sentences.target: Meine EC-Karte steckt noch im Automaten.

translations.de: Meine EC-Karte steckt noch im Automaten.
translations.en: My debit card is still in the machine.
translations.es: Mi tarjeta de débito sigue en el cajero automático.
translations.fr: Ma carte de débit est encore dans le distributeur.
translations.it: La mia carta di debito è ancora nel bancomat.
translations.ko: 내 체크카드가 아직 기계에 꽂혀 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的借记卡还在取款机里。
translations.yue: 我張借記卡仲喺部提款機入面。
translations.ru: Моя дебетовая карта всё ещё в банкомате.
translations.pt: Meu cartão de débito ainda está no caixa eletrônico.
translations.vi: Thẻ ghi nợ của tôi vẫn còn trong máy ATM.
translations.ar: بطاقة الخصم الخاصة بي لا تزال في الصراف الآلي.
translations.nl: Mijn pinpas zit nog in de automaat.
translations.uk: Моя дебетова картка досі в банкоматі.
translations.hu: A bankkártyám még a gépben van.
translations.hi: मेरा डेबिट कार्ड अभी भी एटीएम में है.
translations.pl: Moja karta debetowa wciąż jest v bankomacie.
translations.el: Η χρεωστική μου κάρτα είναι ακόμα στο ΑΤΜ.
translations.nb: Bankkortet mitt sitter fortsatt i automaten.
translations.id: Kartu debit saya masih ada di mesin ATM.
translations.sv: Mitt bankkort sitter fortfarande i automaten.
translations.ro: Cardul meu de debit e încă în bancomat.
translations.cs: Moje debetní karta je pořád v bankomatu.
translations.da: Mit debetkort sidder stadig i automaten.
translations.ja: 私のデビットカードはまだATMに挿さったままです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative feminine singular; modifies the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; denotes being located/inserted.
Temporal adverb; indicates continuation of a state.
Fused preposition+article (‘in dem’); governs dative; introduces a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine dative singular (form ‘-en’); object of the preposition ‘im’.

sentences.target: Lisa tippt die PIN der EC-Karte ein.
sentences.reading: /ˈliːza tɪpt diː pɪn deːɐ eːˈtseːˌkaʁtə aɪ̯n/

translations.de: Lisa tippt die PIN der EC-Karte ein.
translations.ipa: /ˈliːza tɪpt diː pɪn deːɐ eːˈtseːˌkaʁtə aɪ̯n/
translations.en: Lisa enters the PIN for the debit card.
translations.es: Lisa introduce el PIN de la tarjeta de débito.
translations.fr: Lisa saisit le code PIN de la carte de débit.
translations.it: Lisa digita il PIN della carta di debito.
translations.zh-Hans: 丽莎输入借记卡的密码。
translations.pt: Lisa digita a senha do cartão de débito.
translations.he: ליסה מקלידה את הקוד הסודי של כרטיס החיוב.
translations.vi: Lisa nhập mã PIN của thẻ ghi nợ.
translations.ar: ليزا تُدخل الرقم السري لبطاقة الخصم.
translations.nl: Lisa voert de pincode van de pinpas in.
translations.hi: लीसा डेबिट कार्ड का पिन दर्ज कर रही है.
translations.el: Η Λίζα πληκτρολογεί το PIN της χρεωστικής κάρτας.
translations.ro: Lisa introduce PIN-ul cardului de debit.
translations.ja: リサはデビットカードの暗証番号を入力しています。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; part of the separable verb ‘eintippen’ with the particle ‘ein’.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; introduces the direct object ‘PIN’.
Common noun (abbreviation), feminine singular; direct object of ‘tippt’.
Definite article, genitive feminine singular; marks the possessor in ‘der EC-Karte’.
Common noun, feminine singular genitive; genitive attribute specifying the PIN.
Separable verbal particle; combines with ‘tippt’ to form ‘eintippen’ (‘to type in’). Appears sentence-final due to verb-second order.
